chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-2143 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. FRESH CASE 1.For orders on CMA 8573/25 2.For orders on office objections 3.For orders on CMA 8574/25 4.For orders on CMA 8575/25 5.For hearing of main case 22-12-2025 Mr. Gulshan Ahmed Shujrah, Advocate for the petitioner. **** 1. Urgency is granted. 2to5. Counsel for the petitioner, under instructions, does not press instant petition, which is accordingly disposed of as not pressed along with listed application(s). JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
